issues.claim: Verse supports chapter 4 thesis at appropriate thread
issues.objection: 4.34 sits in thread 3 (supremacy of jñāna-yajña) of the chapter-4 thesis; the engineering layer remains anchored to that thread. The chapter's voice transition (cosmic 4.1-4.10 → operational 4.11+) is honored — 4.34 is firmly in the operational register, with STRETCHED tagging honest where the verse reaches into the metaphysical (4.24 brahman-everywhere, 4.36-4.37 fire-of-knowledge metaphor).

notes: 4.34 supports the chapter-4 thesis: supremacy of knowledge-illuminated work. PASS.
